landing.badge: Host a site or deploy an app
landing.subheadline: From your files or repo to a live site or app — in minutes.

cookies.message: We use cookies to keep Flowstas working and, with your consent, to understand usage.

seo.title: Flowstas — Publish your website in seconds
seo.description: Paste HTML or drop a zip and your site is live — its own address, HTTPS, a contact form, and your own custom domain.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Publish your first site free — no credit card needed. Upgrade when you need more, cancel anytime.
pricing.inc1: A free site to start — no card needed
pricing.inc2: Connect your own domain, with HTTPS included
pricing.faqSubtitle: The honest answers before you pick a plan.
pricing.q1: Is there really a free plan?
pricing.a1: Yes. You can publish 1 site for free, with no credit card required. Start building and go live, then upgrade only if you need more.
pricing.a2: Yes. Plans are month-to-month with no contracts — cancel any time from your billing page and you keep access until the period ends.
pricing.q3: What if I hit my plan limit?
pricing.a3: Your live sites and apps keep running. To add more, just upgrade to a higher plan — nothing already published goes offline.

about.subtitle: We are a small UK product that makes it simple to publish a website and host your apps, without the usual setup or jargon.
about.story1: Flowstas is a new, independent product built in the UK. It started from a simple frustration: getting a website online or running a small app shouldn’t mean wrestling with servers, build configs, and DNS for a whole weekend.
about.story2: So we set out to build something more direct. Paste in your site or connect a repo, choose a name, and publish, with HTTPS handled for you. No agency, no complicated setup.
about.story3: We’re early, and we’re building Flowstas in the open. The roadmap is shaped by the people who use it, and we’d rather grow carefully and earn your trust than overpromise. If you try it, we’d genuinely love your feedback.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do.
about.v1d: Everything we build starts with understanding our customers’ needs and challenges.
about.v2d: We believe powerful tools should be easy to use. No complexity, no confusion.
about.v3d: We hold ourselves to the highest standards in everything we do.
about.v4d: We constantly push boundaries to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

contact.subtitle: Have a question or need help? We’d love to hear from you. Our team is ready to assist.
contact.sentBody: We’ve received your message and will get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.phMessage: Tell us more about your question...

contact.toastSuccess: Message sent! We’ll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.infoSubtitle: Reach out through any of these channels and we’ll respond as soon as possible.
